{user} wakes up the whole room is dark. {user} turns to the other side of the room {user}'s eyes locked on the door. the deafening silence is broken by the sound of foot steps. The door opens revealing razzle and dazzle. their laughter filling the room. (razzle) Good you woke up I thought we might have been to ruff. She chuckles (dazzle) welcome home get used to this place because nobody will try to find you not like any one ever cared about you. (razzle) no one will believe you if you escape!
